_publications._publicationTitle: Overcoming BET Inhibitor Resistance in Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors.

_contextSnippet: we found that a single base pair insertion in one allele and a 50-base pair deletion in the other allele in the sgBrd4-targeted clone c4...resulted in loss of BRD4 protein expression
details: Clone c4 had single base pair insertion in one allele and 50-base pair deletion in other allele resulting in loss of BRD4 protein expression
